creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Currently USES=compiler:c++11-lib doesn't add --std=c++11 to CXXFLAGS. Additionally, in the case of gcc compiler the flag should be -std=c++11. Please see devel/jsoncpp as an example (USES there should be changed to compiler:c++11-lib), and the bug https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=211115 that says that it fails with gcc compiler in part because of this flag.

gcc-c++11-lib should do the same after setting the compiler type, or shouldn't be there at all.
